analysis.bootstrap_p_value: two-sided approximate equal-tail confidence-curve tail probability from the same paired image-cluster bootstrap draws as the percentile interval; despite the compatibility field name, this is not claimed to be an exact null-calibrated p-value
analysis.comparisons: four predeclared adjacent-geometry contrasts; every reported difference is AURC(left) - AURC(right)
analysis.cross_loss_policy: all method-by-risk AURCs are reported descriptively; only the four declared adjacent-geometry contrasts receive bootstrap intervals and the multiplicity-aware Holm transform
analysis.tie_policy: analytic expectation over random within-tie order

numerical_validation.exact_match_definition: fraction with exact floating-point equality and no tolerance
numerical_validation.rank_agreement_definition: Spearman correlation of average ranks and Kendall tau-b over image-level confidences; null when either ranking is constant

multiple_testing.confidence_intervals: unadjusted equal-tail percentile intervals from the same paired bootstrap draws; the Holm transform applies only within the named family

core.definition: Oxford Pet, Kvasir-SEG, and FIVES conditions across the four predeclared adjacent-geometry contrasts

extension.definition: ISIC 2018 and TN3K conditions across the four predeclared adjacent-geometry contrasts

multiple_testing.family_policy: core and extension experiments are distinct predeclared families; approximate tail probabilities are never pooled across them
multiple_testing.procedure: Holm step-down transform of approximate bootstrap tail probabilities, applied separately within each family; no exact finite-sample FWER control is claimed
